title: Etsy Lost 1.4 Million Active Sellers in a Year
text: Etsy's active seller metrics revealed significant challenges in the marketplace. The company reported a 20% decline in active sellers in Q4 2024, dropping to 5.6 million from 7 million the year prior. This 1.4 million seller decrease was the largest year-over-year seller decline in recent periods. The decline was attributed to new onboarding fees introduced to improve seller quality and enhanced trust and safety initiatives. Management acknowledged that while these initiatives were designed to strengthen the marketplace long-term, they created short-term friction for seller acquisition. The seller decline compounded the challenges from buyer metrics, as both sides of the two-sided marketplace faced headwinds from macroeconomic pressure and competitive intensity in the e-commerce sector.
